abilities.name: Betrayal's Current
abilities.text: When this model activates, it moves up to 4" towards an enemy model.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (magic) actions may not be reduced this way.

abilities.name: Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Repressed Aggression
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a friendly upgrade attached, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Burst of Speed
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring other models. Enemy models moved through this way are dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Drowning Dream
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Attach a Waterlogged upgrade to the target.

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Premonition
triggers.text: Look at the top card of your fate deck. This model may discard it.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (fortitude). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Fury of the Phantom
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Move this model up to its Sp, ignoring models. Enemy models moved through this way are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Dragged Under
triggers.text: Attach a Waterlogged upgrade to an enemy model within 2" of this model.

triggers.name: Lethal Aura
triggers.text: This model gains an Aura (Hazardous) token.
